package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_query_inside_loop_without_batching: Layer: Database access. Flag SQL queries issued inside loops where batching or IN queries can bound round trips.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule525NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario525Negative(records []Rule525NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
